parameters.content:
## NOT YET DEPLOYED (#28)
Built 2026-07-21, never imported into this n8n instance — VPS SSH was fail2ban-locked for the whole session. See docs/RUNBOOK.md "ICP Config Loader (#28)" section for the exact import/publish/verify steps before relying on this workflow, and remove this note once verified live.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { configOk: false, reason_detail: $input.item.json.error || 'json parse failed (unknown error)' } }];

parameters.errorMessage: =ICP Config Loader: config/icp.default.json failed validation (check the /config bind mount and file contents on the n8n container). Detail: {{ $json.reason_detail }}. No score was computed — this fails loudly rather than falling back to a silent default config.
